班撚樣上星期唔係好大義凜然咁屌人偷拍架咩

大家可能會覺得，頸同痴漢應該冇關係。但事實唔係咁

“Neck

The neck, clavicle area and the back of the neck are very sensitive in both males and females, which can be stimulated by licking, kissing or light caressing. Some people also like being bitten gently in these areas, often to the point that a "hickey", or "love-bite" is formed.[16]” (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Erogenous_zone)

無論男女，頸都係敏感部位，可以引起性慾。

"Two types of erogenous zones exist in the skin: nonspecific and specific. In the nonspecific type the skin is similar to any other portion of the usual haired skin. The nerves supplying it are composed of the usual density of dermal-nerve networks and hair-follicle networks. Examples of this type of skin are the sides and back of the neck, the axillas and the sides of the thorax. " (PROCEEDINGS OF THE STAFF MEETINGS OF THE MAYO CLINIC, Volume 34, Number 2: Pages 39-47,
Rochester, Minnesota, January 21, 1959.)
